/CAL:BEHAVIOR COURT GRADUATION/DAWT/X:DEFENDANT HAS SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETEDTHE BEHAVOIR COURT PROGRAM,/CTORD:FINES AND FEES ARE STAYED PERMANENTLY//CONTD: BEHAVIOR COURT REPORT, POST GRADUATION/

/CAL  SENTENCING/ BHC FELONY/X  SENTENCE AS TO COUNT 3/CTWP  111/  /X  CRDIT FOR TIME SERVED IS WAIVED FOR BHC PURPOSES ONLY,/ /AJW/CH3:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1D/CTS:1/4019HALF/WS/DNACOMP/IND/RX/X: NO ALCOHOL/DTC/WEAP/RESTV/X:STAY AWAY ORDER ON FILE REMAINS IN EFFECT/DEF:  SHALL COMPLY WITH TREATMENTPLAN AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE BY BHC PROGRAM AND MUST NOT INCUR ANY NEW ARRESTS/CTORD: THAT IF THE DEFENDANT IS PLACED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AND LEAVES WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, THEY WILL BE IN VIOLATION  OF THE BHC PROGRAM AND MAY SERVE ADDITIONAL TIME IN CUSTODY,/X: NO EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION WITHOUT AGREEMENT OF THE BHC PROGRAM,/ /X: IFTHE DEFENDANT COMPLETES THE BHC PROGRAM, CHARGES MAY BE REDUCED TO AMISDEMEANORS PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) WITH PROPER FILING OF MOTION,/VF4: 300/PROBREVFN/PC/PSR/BKFEE/COA:40/ICNA/PPRFCOMP/CTORD: FINES AND FEES IN THIS MATTERARE SUSPENDED AND RESERVES THE RIGHT TO REINSTATE FINES AND FEES/OBEY/ACCEP/PROB ADM REV/NB/X:ORDER FOR RELEASE SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT,/CONTD:BEHAVIOR COURT/DOP/

/CAL: BEHAVIOR COURT DISPO/X:PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO ADD COUNT 3 (245(A)4PC, A FELONY) IS GRANTED/FAWA/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZRTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 3/REMA/ARBUCKLE/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 03-08-18/DISPO/X:ISS; PROB 3Y/X:WAIVER OF CREDITS UP TO SENTENCE FOR ALL TIMES AND PURPOSES PURSUANT TO PC2900,5/X: WS; VF $300; NO ALCOHOL; IND; RX; WEAP; RESTV;/X: DNACOMP; PC; PSR; PROBREVFN; COA $40; ICNA;BKFEE;/SA1:KATRINA NEWSOME, 150 YARDS/SA2:150 YARDS FROM 175 6TH STREET,SAN FRANCISCO/SAORD/DEF: SHALL COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PLAN AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE  BY BHC PROGRAM AND MUST NOT INCUR ANY NEW ARRESTS/CTORD: THAT IFTHE DEFENDANT IS PLACED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AND LEAVES WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, THEY WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF THE BHC PROGRAM AND MAY SERVE UP TO 1 YEAR IN THE COUNTY JAIL,/X: NO EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION WITHOUT AGREEMENT OF THE BHC PROGRAM,/ /X: IF THE DEFENDANTCOMPLETES THE BHC PROGRAM, CHARGES MAY BE REDUCED TO MISDEMEANORS PURSUANTTO PC 17(B) WITH PROPER FILING OF MOTION,/
